center.name: NamibRand Nature Reserve
center.summary: NamibRand Nature Reserve是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Rüppell's korhaan，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is commonly found in the Namibrand Nature Reserve, at Mirabib and Ganab in the Namib-Naukluft Park, at Bloedkoppie, and in the Spitzkoppe surroundings

links.label: 分布于
